headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Reports Record Backlog And Lifts Full Year Outlook
summary: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) reported a record backlog linked to grid and AI-related infrastructure work. The company raised its full-year outlook, citing strong demand for modernization of power and data networks. Management highlighted long-term earnings growth targets alongside expanding project visibility. Quanta Services enters this update with its stock at $702.25 and very large gains over the past 3 years and 5 years. The shares are up 59.7% year to date and 94.8% over the past year,...
